title: BEM-851 execute 850
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:23 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
route=load('governance/state/bem850_route_after_bem849.json')
rs=route.get('status','unknown')
created_files=[]
if rs=='next_process_response':
    status='process_response_ready'
    next_action='parse real Claude response and produce agreed protocol'
elif rs=='next_fix_pending_queue':
    queue=[]
    for p in sorted(Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue').glob('*.json')):
        queue.append({'path':str(p),'preview':read(p)[:500]})
    status='pending_queue_inspected'
    next_action='if queue remains, harden processor or remove stale invalid queue; then tick'
elif rs=='next_patch_response_writer':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem851_response_writer_retry.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v12','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-851 response writer retry after dispatch/runtime proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='response_writer_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real Claude response'
elif rs=='next_patch_runtime_state':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem851_runtime_state_retry.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v12','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-851 runtime state retry after dispatch proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='runtime_state_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify runtime state'
elif rs=='next_fix_dispatch_processor':
    status='dispatch_processor_fix_required'
    next_action='inspect processor marker/results and patch queue processor'
else:
    status='unknown_route_no_action'
    next_action='diagnose route '+rs
state={'bem':'BEM-851','status':status,'route_status':rs,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem851_execute_bem850_route.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem851_execute_bem850_route.md').write_text('# BEM-851 | Execute BEM-850 Route | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem851_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-851'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem851_execute_bem850_route.json','governance/reports/bem851_execute_bem850_route.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem851_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-850 route by inspecting pending queue or queuing runtime/response writer retry')
"""
No issue comments.
